trust.title: Trust Center

trust.compliance_note: For a full compliance report against a specific standard or audit-ready documentation, contact our sales team.
trust.sub: Certifications, compliance matrix, supply-chain sovereignty, and Pesaba's security posture — all in one place.
trust.certifications_desc: National and international certifications across all product lines.
trust.fpga_desc: No OS means no software attack surface — ever.
trust.supply_chain_desc: Full design, manufacturing, and testing in Iran.
trust.aes_desc: Hardware-native AES-256 encryption with no software intermediary.
trust.sla_desc: 12-month warranty with enterprise SLA extension options.
trust.parts_desc: Minimum 5-year spare-parts availability guaranteed for all production models.

careers.no_openings: No open positions are listed at this time.
careers.no_openings_sub: To be considered for future roles, send your CV to the address below.
careers.send_cv_sub: If you have expertise in any of the following areas and a passion for hardware security, we'd like to hear from you:

why_cards.title: Domestically Engineered
why_cards.body: All hardware is designed and manufactured in Tehran. No foreign firmware dependency, no supply-chain exposure, and no cloud activation requirements.

why_cards.title: OS-less FPGA Architecture
why_cards.body: Our devices carry no operating system on the data path. The result is a hardware attack surface measured in components, not CVEs.

why_cards.title: Certified & Compliant
why_cards.body: Products are certified by AFTA, Padafand, and MASAF. We are pursuing EAL2+ Common Criteria evaluation for the data-diode product line.

why_cards.title: Expert Engineering Team
why_cards.body: Our team holds advanced degrees from Iran's leading universities in electrical engineering, computer science, and cryptography.

industries.title: Industries
industries.sub: Deployment patterns for power, telecom, water, government, defense, finance, and manufacturing networks.
industries.index_sub: Pesaba network security solutions for every sector — data diodes, encryption, and monitoring.

solutions.headline: Mission-fit solutions for critical infrastructure
solutions.sub: Browse deployment paths by industry and operational scenario, from SCADA isolation to cellular quality monitoring.
solutions.industry_desc_power_grid: Substation segmentation, OT/IT isolation, and one-way monitoring flows.
solutions.industry_desc_telecom: KPI measurement, drive test, and secure telemetry for operator networks.
solutions.industry_desc_government: Hardware encryption and domain separation for high-assurance networks.
solutions.industry_desc_water: Water quality monitoring and real-time alerting for essential utilities.
solutions.usecase_desc_one_way: One-way data transfer with no return path and no general-purpose software.
solutions.usecase_desc_ot_it: Hardware-enforced segmentation between operational and enterprise networks.
solutions.usecase_desc_aes: FPGA-native line-rate encryption for sensitive backbone and inter-site links.
solutions.usecase_desc_cellular: Coverage and KPI analysis from field probes to centralized reporting.

technology.headline: Security in hardware; independent of software layers
technology.sub: Pesaba systems are designed around FPGA-native data paths, OS-less control surfaces, and a deliberately small attack surface.
technology.compare_desc: Review architecture choices, link rates, and form factors side by side.
technology.trust_desc: Inspect certifications, supply-chain posture, and security commitments.
technology.pillar_fpga_desc: Critical data paths are implemented in dedicated logic, not on a general-purpose CPU.
technology.pillar_osless_desc: Attack surface is reduced by avoiding operating-system dependencies and ancillary services.
technology.pillar_oneway_desc: In one-way products, return-path behavior is constrained at the hardware level.
technology.pillar_local_desc: Design, manufacturing, and validation stay within a locally controlled engineering chain.

resources.headline: Technical resources, research, and support material
resources.sub: Browse articles, glossary terms, datasheets, and firmware resources from one place.
resources.glossary_desc: Reference terms for networking, telecom, and security.
resources.datasheets_desc: Product documents and paths to technical specifications.
resources.datasheets_sub: Full technical specifications for each product are available on its product page. For signed PDF datasheets, contact our technical support team.
resources.firmware_desc: Releases, updates, and signed firmware files.
resources.signed_pdf_desc: For procurement, government tendering, or institutional buying processes, we provide signed PDF datasheets with serial numbers, certifications, and full specifications.
resources.firmware_page_sub: Pesaba firmware is distributed only through our technical support channel after device-serial verification. This policy preserves the hardware chain of trust and prevents distribution of unsigned or tampered images.
resources.firmware_requirements_title: What we need to release firmware
resources.firmware_req_org: Organisation name and technical contact details
resources.firmware_req_reason: Reason for the update (bug fix, new feature, security compliance)
resources.firmware_policy_signed: All releases are digitally signed with the company private key.
resources.firmware_policy_critical: Critical security releases are proactively communicated to active customers.
resources.firmware_policy_jtag: FPGA-only devices in the field are not remotely updatable — they require return-to-factory or in-person JTAG flashing.

assistant.title: Pesaba Assistant
assistant.intro: Hi! I can help you find the right product, answer technical questions, or get you a quote.
assistant.fallback: For a detailed answer, please contact our sales team or browse the products page.

meta.default_description: Iranian-engineered data diodes, network encryptors, and cellular monitoring tools. FPGA-native. OS-less. Deployed across critical infrastructure since 2008.
